summary: iter51 News-watch editorial board — backend 10/10 PASS, frontend e2e flow fully verified. All regressions green.
critical_code_review_comments: news_watch.py:list_items — `before` filter sets `q['captured_at']['$lt'] = before` but if source/category/min_relevance not used, `q.setdefault('captured_at', {})` is fine. However, captured_at is stored as ISO string (per the codebase) so lexicographic `$lt` works only for canonical UTC isoformat strings — worth a code comment for future maintainers.

news_watch.py:stats — `ticker_24h`/`archive_24h` use string comparison on captured_at (ISO). Functional only if all writers use timezone-aware UTC isoformat. Currently consistent; a TTL/index sanity test in test_iter51 could lock this in.
news_watch.py:kill — reason is truncated to 200 chars (`.strip()[:200] or None`). Document this in the API spec / admin UI so editors aren't surprised by silent truncation.

BackOfficeNewsWatch.jsx — the `act()` function does not surface non-2xx error toasts when the body has no `detail` field; falls back to status code only. Consider catching `network error` too (currently silently sets busyUrl back to null on throw).
BackOfficeNewsWatch.jsx — KILL uses `window.confirm` (native dialog). Functional but inconsistent with the rest of the back-office which uses inline confirm UI. Low priority.
BackOfficeNewsWatch.jsx — minRelevance is sent as string via URLSearchParams which the backend coerces to int. Fine, but the input has no upper-bound validation client-side (backend accepts any int).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (auth, tabs, stats, filters, promote/demote round-trip, kill/unkill round-trip, index tile all verified)

seed_data_creation: None. Live MongoDB used. Promoted+demoted one archive item (clean round-trip, state restored). Killed+unkilled one archive item (clean round-trip).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter51 fully verified. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iter51_news_watch.py (10/10). Frontend route: /back-office/news-watch with tabs archive|ticker|rejected. Stats observed: ticker_total=577 (+232/24h), archive_total=554 (+192/24h), rejected_total=0. Toast verified for promote+unkill. Optimistic row removal works. Back-office index tile [data-testid=back-office-link-news-watch] present in Content group with exact spec description. RSS skip behavior was code-reviewed only (per spec). Mocked: Resend email dispatch only.
